examples: He grew up in a houseful of women.
They had a houseful so we didn't stay.
We've got a houseful of visitors.
Switch boxes and lock-and-latch boxes as well as nine different build-it-yourself musical instruments that are sure to inspire a whole houseful of racket, make up this fine tome.
It was beginning to sound as if a live Uncle Enos would be even more difficult to get along with than a whole houseful of ghosts, even regular ghosts of the misty-sheet variety.
